abp-infrastructure/check-simple-state: niche ABP abstraction; generic alt is ad-hoc inline if-checks, no stable anti token
abp-infrastructure/configure-logging: ABP does not replace ILogger; Serilog bootstrap is host wiring, no code fork
abp-infrastructure/integrate-ai: chat call uses Microsoft.Extensions.AI IChatClient in both; API version-unstable
abp-infrastructure/integrate-autofac: one-line module/host wiring, config not a code fork
abp-infrastructure/read-configuration: overlaps stock IConfiguration; same injected type, no distinctive fork
abp-infrastructure/toggle-global-feature: startup capability gating; no clean BCL alternative a naive model reaches for
abp-data-access/configure-connection-str: config-only (appsettings + options mapping), no generic-vs-ABP code fork
abp-runtime/configure-production-hosting: release checklist over stock ASP.NET Core APIs; no ABP-specific code fork
abp-authentication/configure-openiddict-: setup via OpenIddict-native builder + options, no ABP-vs-generic fork
OpenIddict-native validation wiring; AddAbpJwtBearer is a thin wrapper
abp-module-development/layered-architect: placement/reference-flow concept; markers owned by other skills
abp-api/configure-cors: plain ASP.NET Core CORS wiring; only ABP token is a non-load-bearing helper
abp-cli/choose-solution-architecture: high-level decision skill, no code output
abp-module-development/separate-domain-a: decision guide for placing a rule in the domain vs application layer; correctness is about where logic goes, not a presence/absence marker fork
